meta.title: Zambia CDC 2024 Physical Education Syllabus — Structured RAG Dataset
meta.source: Ministry of Education, Curriculum Development Centre — PHYSICAL-EDUCATION-SYLLABUS-FORM-1-4.pdf
meta.purpose: Structured curriculum data for AI-assisted quiz, lesson plan, and assessment generation. Each record maps to one embeddable chunk aligned to official CDC competences.
meta.subject: Physical Education
meta.extractionNote: Extracted from the official CDC PDF via selective +29 font-offset decode and table parsing. Content is transcribed from the source, not fabricated.
